productDisplayName: Franco Leone Men Formal Black Shoes
description: Classic three-hole lace-up shoe with a clean, slim silhouette and an upraised stacked heel by franco leone for men. The strategic stitch detailing on this Franco Leone derby shoe is a sartorial dream. The shoe is a minimalist's reinterpretation of the classic Derby. Wear this shoe crafted from Italian leather with slim Fit formal shirts and trousers. UpperLeather upper, has stitch detailing, with a tapering toe boxThree-hole central lace-upsPadded leather liningSoft sockliner for instep comfortPadded tongueMidsoleShock absorbing EVA midsoleOutsoleTPU outsole with an upraised heelRectangular grooves on the midfoot for grip and tractionWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
